ships.name: Margaritaville at Sea Paradise
ships.notes: In service. Sails from Port of Palm Beach to Key West and The Bahamas. Official about-us page: "Launched in May 2022 with the Margaritaville at Sea Paradise sailing from the Port of Palm Beach." Tonnage, guest capacity, decks and class not published on any official page.

exp.overview: Award-winning cruise ship described as a 'resort at sea'. Sails from Port of Palm Beach on 2- to 5-night itineraries (3-, 4-, 5-night samples) to The Bahamas and Key West. Destinations named: Key West, Bimini (Bahamas), Nassau (Bahamas), Grand Turk (Turks and Caicos), Cozumel (Mexico).

dining.name: Fins Dining
dining.extra: Main dining room; island-inspired signature dishes like Shrimp and Grits and Jimmy's Jambalaya. Complimentary.

dining.name: High Tide Market
dining.extra: Market-style included dining with five stations: Mexican Cutie Cantina (street tacos, rice bowls), License to Chill Sandwich Shack (deli sandwiches, paninis), Slice of Paradise (desserts, pastries), Provisions Salads & More (salads), Frank & Lola's Pizzeria (stone-baked pizza). Complimentary.

dining.name: Cheeseburger in Paradise Burger Bar
dining.extra: Build-your-own burgers, located at 5 o'Clock Somewhere Bar and Grill. Complimentary.

dining.name: Margaritaville Coffee Shop
dining.extra: All-day cafe serving beverages and grab-and-go items. Complimentary.

dining.name: 5 o'Clock Somewhere Bar and Grill
dining.extra: Indoor-outdoor venue with burgers and drinks.

dining.name: JWB Prime Steakhouse
dining.extra: Upscale steakhouse (named after Jimmy Buffett); prime steaks and seafood. Additional charge.

dining.name: Far Side Sushi
dining.extra: Specialty sushi restaurant; inventive sushi rolls, small plates, rice and ramen bowls. Additional charge.

activities.name: Margaritaville Casino
activities.extra: Sports betting, slot machines, and table games with various denominations.

activities.name: Spa & Fitness
activities.extra: Spa services and fitness facilities named on ship overview; individual venue names not officially detailed.

activities.name: 12 Volt Bar & Pool
activities.extra: Adults-only poolside bar/pool area.

activities.name: License to Chill Cabanas
activities.extra: Poolside cabanas.

activities.name: License to Chill Bar
activities.extra: Casual frozen margarita bar by main pool.

activities.name: Wine Tasting
activities.extra: Educational sessions on history, flavor and styles of European wines.

activities.name: Mixology & Flair
activities.extra: Bartending demonstrations with flair techniques.

activities.name: Bingo
activities.extra: Games throughout sailing days.

entertainment.name: Radio Margaritaville: Live at Sea
entertainment.extra: Signature production; musical celebration of all things Margaritaville spanning genres and decades.

entertainment.name: Caribbean Heat
entertainment.extra: Signature production; tropical dance performance with dancers and acrobats.

entertainment.name: Stars on the Water Theater
entertainment.extra: Main theater venue named on ship overview.

entertainment.name: Euphoria Lounge
entertainment.extra: Bar/lounge featuring live entertainment and activities.

entertainment.name: Hemisphere Dancer Craft Spirits
entertainment.extra: Piano lounge with craft cocktails.

entertainment.name: Hemisphere Nightclub
entertainment.extra: Late-night dance venue on Deck 14.

entertainment.name: Keys on the Water
entertainment.extra: Karaoke and comedy lounge.

entertainment.name: White Hot Neon Nights
entertainment.extra: Theme night with pulsing lights, electrifying drinks and live DJ.

entertainment.name: Sail Away Party
entertainment.extra: Musical celebration as the ship departs.

entertainment.name: Sun Deck Activities
entertainment.extra: Live music including Caribbean bands, steel drums and DJ sets.

entertainment.name: Game Shows
entertainment.extra: Trivia, scavenger hunts, and Love and Marriage show.

entertainment.name: Karaoke
entertainment.extra: Onboard singing performances.

entertainment.name: Parrot Photos
entertainment.extra: Photo opportunities with Margaritaville's signature parrot.

kids_family.name: Jolly Mon Kid's Club
kids_family.extra: Ocean-themed arts and crafts, immersive cultural experiences, interactive games, mascot visits and mermaid storytelling.

kids_family.name: Parakeets Kid's Club
kids_family.ages: 6-9 (tweens 7-12 also join here on Paradise, which has no separate Tween Club)
kids_family.extra: Magic workshops, Mayan temple escape games, DJ Academy activities.

kids_family.name: The Teen's Club
kids_family.extra: Video games, ping pong, dodgeball, scavenger hunts, poolside movie takeovers, nightclub events.

ships.name: Margaritaville at Sea Islander
ships.notes: In service. Official about-us page: "expanded in June 2024 with the addition of the Margaritaville at Sea Islander, offering cruises from Port Tampa Bay." Tonnage, guest capacity, decks and class not published on any official page.

exp.overview: Launched 2024. Sails from Port Tampa Bay on 4- to 10-night cruises to Key West, Mexico and the Caribbean. Destinations named: Key West (FL), Cozumel (Mexico), Progreso (Mexico), and Western Caribbean ports (Jamaica, Belize, Grand Cayman, Honduras/Roatan). Features a 14-story tropical atrium, the first three-story poolside LandShark Bar, and 'twice the bars and restaurants' vs Paradise.

dining.name: Fins Dining
dining.extra: Main dining room; island-inspired dishes and signature favorites. Complimentary.

dining.name: Port of Indecision Buffet
dining.extra: Breakfast, lunch and dinner; wide selection of entrees, chef-attended stations, fresh salads, sides, desserts. Complimentary.

dining.name: Mexican Cutie Cantina
dining.extra: Street-style tacos and breakfast burritos near 5 o'Clock Somewhere Pool. Complimentary.

dining.name: Cheeseburger in Paradise Burger Bar
dining.extra: Build-your-own burgers at 5 o'Clock Somewhere Pool. Complimentary.

dining.name: Frank & Lola's Pizzeria
dining.extra: Hand-tossed pizza near the buffet; room service option available for additional charge. Complimentary at venue.

dining.name: Margaritaville Coffee Shop
dining.extra: Grab-and-go favorites with gourmet coffee and beverages.

dining.name: JWB Prime Steakhouse
dining.extra: Upscale two-story steakhouse; casual elegance and island charm. Additional charge.

dining.name: Far Side Sushi
dining.extra: Asian-fusion sushi bar; specialty rolls and sea-cuterie boards. Additional charge.

dining.name: Island Eats
dining.extra: Adults-only seafood shack at Tiki Bar; peel-and-eat shrimp, nachos, crab salad. Additional charge.

dining.name: Tiki Grill
dining.extra: Adults-only venue at Tiki Bar; tropical-inspired dishes with ocean views. Additional charge.

dining.name: In-Room Dining
dining.extra: Service to staterooms; breakfast and light bites.

activities.name: Margaritaville Casino
activities.extra: Sports betting, new slot machines, and classic table games.

activities.name: LandShark Pool
activities.extra: Energetic party-vibe pool; ship also has the first three-story poolside LandShark Bar.

activities.name: 5 o'Clock Somewhere Pool
activities.extra: Laid-back pool with music and bites.

activities.name: The Tiki Pool
activities.extra: Ultra-relaxed adults-only (18+) retreat.

activities.name: Caribbean Amphibian Splash and Slide
activities.extra: Water slide feature named on ship overview.

activities.name: Dis and Dat Activity Zone
activities.extra: First-ever cornhole-meets-mini-golf course at sea.

activities.name: Paradise Pickleball at Sea
activities.extra: Onboard pickleball for friendly competition.

activities.name: Defying Gravity Experience
activities.extra: Family experiences: circus-themed workshops, interactive game shows, scavenger hunts.

activities.name: Spa & Fitness
activities.extra: Spa services and fitness facilities available fleet-wide; individual Islander venue names not officially detailed.

activities.name: Wine Tasting
activities.extra: Educational sessions on history, flavor and styles of wines.

activities.name: Mixology & Flair
activities.extra: Bartending demonstrations on the open deck.

activities.name: Bingo
activities.extra: Games throughout sailing days.

entertainment.name: Radio Margaritaville: Live at Sea
entertainment.extra: Musical celebration of all things Margaritaville spanning genres.

entertainment.name: Caribbean Heat Remix
entertainment.extra: Tropical music show with dancers and acrobats.

entertainment.name: Conky Tonkin' At Sea
entertainment.extra: Country music-themed experience with performances and dancing; part of the Boots and Bubbles theme night.

entertainment.name: Boots and Bubbles (theme night)
entertainment.extra: Captain's margarita toast, high-energy entertainment (Conky Tonkin' at Sea), themed dining and cocktail menus (champagne and bourbon), line dancing classes, family activities.

entertainment.name: White Hot Neon Nights
entertainment.extra: Theme night with pulsing lights.

entertainment.name: Two new scripted live production shows
entertainment.extra: Two new scripted live production shows unique to Islander (titles not individually named on page).

entertainment.name: Sail Away Party
entertainment.extra: Departure celebration with music and dancing.

entertainment.name: Sun Deck Activities
entertainment.extra: Live music featuring Caribbean bands, steel drums and DJ sets.

entertainment.name: Game Shows
entertainment.extra: Trivia, scavenger hunts, and Love and Marriage show.

entertainment.name: Karaoke
entertainment.extra: Onboard singing performances.

entertainment.name: Parrot Photos
entertainment.extra: Photo opportunity with Margaritaville's signature parrot.

kids_family.name: Jolly Mon Kid's Club
kids_family.extra: Ocean-themed arts and crafts, immersive cultural experiences, interactive games, mascot visits and mermaid storytelling.

kids_family.name: Parakeets Kid's Club
kids_family.extra: Magic workshops, Mayan temple escape games, DJ Academy activities.

kids_family.name: The Hangout Tween's Club
kids_family.extra: Trivia, board games, jewelry making, DJ Academy, glow parties.

kids_family.name: The Teen's Club
kids_family.extra: Video games, ping pong, dodgeball, scavenger hunts, poolside movie takeovers, nightclub events.

kids_family.name: Character Breakfast: Parrots, Pirates and Pancakes
